name: Steve Grossman
abstract: Steven Mark Grossman (January 18, 1951 – August 13, 2020) was an American jazz fusion and hard bop saxophonist. Grossman was Wayne Shorter's replacement in Miles Davis's jazz-fusion band.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Chase, the Bill Evans Trio, and the Elvin Jones Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: We were definitely – me and Steve were definitely together all the time. We were buds. We were like living together.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Don Alias
about_quotes.evidence: First of all the Stone Alliance thing with Gene Perla... And Steve Grossman. So it was a trio.
